Clinical Solutions

HA fillers, body fillers, PLLA/PCL-based fillers, and professional volume restoration products.

25+ Products

PDRN/PN, exosomes, collagen stimulators, mesotherapy, and revitalizing injectable care.

Fat Dissolvers

10+ Products

Lipolytic products for body contouring, V-line care, and localized fat reduction protocols.

Accessories

30+ Products

Numbing creams, hyaluronidase, support items, and professional-use accessories.

Browse Category

Explore our extensive range of high-quality Korean aesthetics products.

Select Products

Submit your request and our B2B team will provide exclusive wholesale pricing within 24 hours.

Cookie & KVKK Consent
